start.welcome_new:
👋 Hey {name}!

Share your link — anyone who opens it can send you an anonymous message.

👉 {link}

They won't know it's you. You won't know it's them.
start.banned: You are banned from this bot.

compose.delivered: ✅ Delivered. They have no idea who you are.
compose.rate_limited: You're sending too fast — try again in a moment.
compose.unsupported: That type of content isn't supported here.

reply.prompt: ✍️ Write your reply — it will be sent anonymously:
reply.gone: The conversation is no longer reachable.

block.confirmed: ✅ Blocked. You won't hear from them again.

help.body: Share your link — anyone who opens it can send you an anonymous message. You can reply anonymously or block them. Neither side ever knows who the other is.

admin.broadcast_prompt: Send the broadcast message (any content type):
admin.broadcast_preview:
Preview sent above ☝️

Send to {count} users?
